mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_USER_INFO (USER_CD, USER_NM, PASSWORD, APPROWAITCNT, USE_YN, LOGIN_DATE, BRC, BRNM, IP_ADDRESS, EXPIRE_DATE) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{userNm}, #{password}, 0, 'Y', #{loginDate}, #{brc}, #{brnm}, #{ipAddress}, #{expireDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_USER_INFO SET LOGIN_DATE = #{loginDate}, BRC = #{brc}, BRNM = #{brnm}, IP_ADDRESS = #{ipAddress}, EXPIRE_DATE = #{expireDate} WHERE USER_CD = #{userCd}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO WHERE USER_CD = #{userCd} LIMIT 1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER (USER_ID, USER_GRP_ID) VALUES ((SELECT USER_ID FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO WHERE USER_CD=#{userCd} LIMIT 1), #{userGrpId}::integer)

INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_MASK_HISTORY (USER_CD, REQ_DATE, APPROVAL_REQ_ID, USER_NM, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_NM, PROC_DATE) VALUES (#{userCd}, #{reqDate}, #{approvalReqId}, #{userNm}, #{programId}, #{programNm}, #{procDate})
